"cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:A/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-358", "name": "Improperly Implemented Security Check for Standard"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "## Summary

A radio with a valid NG Setup can send a forged PDUSessionResourceSetupResponse carrying any UE's AMF-UE-NGAP-ID. Ella Core does not verify the message arrived on the SCTP association bound to that UE's logical NG-connection, then creates a GTP tunnel towards that radio.

## Impact

Downlink user-plane traffic for the targeted UE is redirected to the attacker's radio.

## Fix

UE context lookups are now scoped to the sending radio's SCTP association.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00166, "percentile": 0.06094}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qfxw-v8qx-vj3v", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T15:18:47Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qfxw-v8qx-vj3v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qfxw-v8qx-vj3v"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44473"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-27T17:16:39Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T15:18:47Z", "references": ["https://github.com/ellanetworks/core/security/advisories/GHSA-qfxw-v8qx-vj3v", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44473", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qfxw-v8qx-vj3v"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/ellanetworks/core/security-advisories/GHSA-qfxw-v8qx-vj3v", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/ellanetworks/core", "summary": "Ella Core Vulnerable to UE Downlink Redirection via Forged PDUSessionResourceSetupResponse", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:48:52Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qfxw-v8qx-vj3v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.10.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/ellanetworks/core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.10.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Ella Core Vulnerable to UE Downlink Redirection via Forged PDUSessionResourceSetupResponse
